CROWD_SURGE.title: Predicted Crowd Surge
CROWD_SURGE.trigger: Match Context Agent predicts >70% zone fill within 10 min

actions.label: Send routing nudges to affected fans
Alert zone security lead via email

LOST_CHILD.title: Lost Child Report
LOST_CHILD.trigger: Fan email mentions missing child / lost kid / can't find son/daughter

actions.label: Page security lead with last-known location
Send calm acknowledgment to fan with help-desk location

MEDICAL.title: Medical Emergency
MEDICAL.trigger: Vision Agent detects fallen person OR fan email mentions medical issue

WEATHER_RAIN.title: Imminent Rain
WEATHER_RAIN.trigger: Weather forecast >70% rain in next 15 min

actions.label: Email fans in open-air stands to move under cover

SECURITY_THREAT.title: Inbound Security Threat (phishing / malware)
SECURITY_THREAT.trigger: VirusTotal flags URL or attachment in inbound fan email as malicious

actions.label: Quarantine message; do not pass content to LLM
Email security ops with full threat report
Log to incident database with threat intel

PANIC_BEHAVIOR.title: Panic / Stampede Risk
PANIC_BEHAVIOR.trigger: Vision Agent detects panic behavior OR density >90% with rapid movement

actions.label: Open all emergency exits in zone
